movement.trapdoor_down: You climb down through the trapdoor.
movement.trapdoor_up: You climb up the through the trapdoor.

items.sorcerers_stone_fail: You can't pickup the sorcerer's stone before you drink a magic potion.
items.painting_lifted: You lift the painting and reveal the sorcerer's stone.
items.painting_already_lifted: The painting has already been lifted.
items.chest_opened: You open the chest and find a diamond egg and a flashlight inside.
items.cant_take_hidden_stone: You need to lift the painting first.
items.cant_take_chest_item: You need to open the chest first.
